function.name: find_entities_by_name
function.description: Search the entity graph for entities matching the given phrases. Returns entity details and their relationships.

name.description: Entity name as mentioned in the query

search_phrase.description: Canonical search phrase to match against the entity index

function.name: expand_entity_neighbors
function.description: Fetch entities by their IDs and resolve their relationship names. Use this to traverse the graph from known entity IDs.

entity_ids.description: List of entity_id values to fetch

function.name: vector_search_chunks
function.description: Search document chunks by semantic similarity. Returns short previews; use fetch_chunks_by_id for full text.

function.name: fetch_chunks_by_id
function.description: Retrieve full text of document chunks by their IDs. Use after browsing previews from vector_search_chunks or entity source_chunk_ids.

chunk_ids.description: List of chunk IDs to retrieve

function.name: final_answer
function.description: Provide the final answer to the user's question with source citations. Call this when you have enough context.

answer.description: The complete answer to the user's question, citing sources with [filename] labels

citations.description: List of source filenames referenced in the answer
